title: Correct and complete the Go AlgoChat canonical contract for full implementation and governance coverage
description: Correct and complete the Go AlgoChat canonical contract for full implementation and governance coverage
acceptance_criteria: Canonical AlgoChat requirements describe only implemented behavior and map every governed Go implementation file; strict SpecSync passes with 100% file LOC and exported-API coverage; the Go workflow includes every Trust policy and canonical-spec input while preserving the Go 1.22 through 1.24 matrix; all four agent integrations and the native build vet race-test and Trust gates pass
